text: Entering this space, I am struck by a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The clean, modern environment and blue glow from within the room evoke a futuristic calm. As words on the wall reflect on confusion and meaning, I sense the subtle thrill of standing inside an experiment—my presence part of a poetic process of observation, interpretation, and perhaps a search for significance in an ever-evolving world. There is comfort here in not knowing all the answers, but simply existing within the question.
